name: SplatCloak
description: [SplatCloak](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1234) is a malware that disables EDR-related routines used by Windows Defender and Kaspersky to aid in evading detection.  [SplatCloak](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1234) has been deployed by [SplatDropper](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1232) and is known to be leveraged by [Mustang Panda](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0129) since 2025.
